scripts.preinstall: node -e "if (!process.env.npm_config_user_agent || !process.env.npm_config_user_agent.startsWith('pnpm')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); } if (require('fs').existsSync('package-lock.json')) require('fs').unlinkSync('package-lock.json'); if (require('fs').existsSync('yarn.lock')) require('fs').unlinkSync('yarn.lock');"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
